your_questions.Q1: To the best of your ability, do you believe you worked with me to ensure Neil had adequate time with his father?
your_questions.Q2: Are you aware you mostly kept Neil from his father for a year? What about me were you fearful of in terms of his interaction with me?
your_questions.Q3: Are you aware that parenting is a skill and in order to exercise that skill it needs to occur without a secondary control factor or a sabotage of the learning experience?
